global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with game icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to join the game and watch a promotional video.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Game icons grid
elements.description: A grid of four game icons, each with a circular dot, centered in the ad, representing gameplay elements.

elements.label: Single game icon
elements.description: A single game icon with a circular dot, positioned within the grid, visually indicating a game feature.

elements.label: Single game icon
elements.description: Another single game icon with a circular dot, positioned in the grid, representing gameplay.

elements.label: Single game icon
elements.description: A third single game icon with a circular dot, part of the grid layout, suggesting game interaction.

elements.label: Single game icon
elements.description: The fourth single game icon with a circular dot, completing the grid and emphasizing game features.

elements.label: Small decorative circle
elements.description: A small decorative circle positioned in the center, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Bonus label
elements.description: A bold yellow 'BONUS' label at the top, drawing attention to a special offer.

elements.label: IronQuest title
elements.description: The title 'IronQuest' in a prominent font at the top, indicating the name of the game.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A clear 'Watch now' button at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The main message 'Join the arena Play with friends tonight' in a large, readable font, encouraging engagement.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Bonus title
elements.description: A secondary headline stating 'IronQuest BONUS', emphasizing a promotional aspect.

elements.label: Watch now text
elements.description: Text saying 'Watch now' in a smaller font, reinforcing the call to action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, game icons, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Join the arena Play with friends tonight, IronQuest BONUS, Watch now
